$comment: Reference schema for core docnav config examples that include Markdown native options. Runtime config loading owns global key/source/shape handling, options remains a raw native option map, core merges declared native option sources through the source-level static option registry, and the Markdown adapter owns option semantics such as max_heading_level type and range validation.

enabled.description: Default pagination state for document operations.

limit.description: Default positive Markdown character budget for paginated document operations.

output.description: Default core CLI output mode for document operations.

options.description: Raw adapter-owned native option source map. The current Markdown descriptor declares max_heading_level for outline/find; core preserves the raw value and the Markdown adapter validates its type and 1..6 range when consumed.
